identity.name: LogiFlow Pro
core_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Finance precision meets delivery speed.
Emotion First: Trust for Boss, Speed for Drivers, Clarity for Support.
Content is King: Data is the hero. Big numbers, clear status.
Mobile First: Touch targets > 44px. Bottom navigation is law.

colors.theme_strategy: System default with toggle. High contrast text always.

mobile_nav.style: h-16 bg-background/80 backdrop-blur-lg border-t flex justify-around items-center z-50
mobile_nav.item_style: flex flex-col items-center justify-center w-full h-full text-xs font-medium gap-1 transition-colors

bento_grid.hero_cell: col-span-2 bg-primary text-primary-foreground p-6 rounded-2xl relative overflow-hidden
bento_grid.stat_cell: col-span-1 bg-card p-4 rounded-xl border shadow-sm flex flex-col justify-between

cards.driver_order: bg-card border-l-4 border-l-primary p-4 rounded-r-xl shadow-sm mb-3
cards.inventory_item: flex items-center justify-between p-4 bg-card rounded-xl border mb-2
cards.transaction_row: flex justify-between items-center py-3 border-b border-dashed border-border last:border-0

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground h-12 rounded-lg font-semibold w-full shadow-md active:scale-95 transition-transform
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground h-12 rounded-lg font-medium w-full
buttons.action_fab: fixed bottom-20 right-6 h-14 w-14 rounded-full bg-primary text-white shadow-xl flex items-center justify-center z-40

inputs.search: h-12 bg-muted/50 border-0 focus-visible:ring-1 focus-visible:ring-primary rounded-xl pl-10
inputs.money: text-3xl font-bold text-center border-b-2 border-border focus:border-primary bg-transparent outline-none h-16 w-full

feedback.loading: Skeleton loaders matching the shape of the content.
feedback.empty_state: Minimalist icon + 'No items found' text + Clear CTA.

boss.theme: Command Center. High density data, dark mode preferred for contrast.
key_features: Overview Widgets: Total Revenue, Net Profit (highlighted).
Pending Collections: List view with 'Mark Paid' swipe actions.
Settings: Toggle switches for compensation model. Inputs for rates.
Order Form: Address autocomplete (mock), Product search.
Inventory: Grid of products with Stock Count badges.

driver.theme: On-the-Go. Large text, high contrast, minimal clicks.
key_features: Earnings: Big counter at top. Date picker for history.

tech_stack_instructions.state: zustand (recommended for global cart/user state) or React Context

instructions_to_main_agent: 2. Theme: Implement a 'ThemeProvider' wrapping the app for Dark/Light toggle.
3. Navigation: Create a persistent 'BottomNav' component that changes options based on User Role.
4. Mock DB: Create a 'lib/store.js' using Zustand or Context to hold Orders, Inventory, and User Settings in memory (simulate DB).
5. Testing: Add 'data-testid' to every interactive element (buttons, inputs, cards).
6. Mobile Optimization: Ensure all click targets are at least 44px. Use 'touch-action-manipulation' on buttons.
7. Critical: The Boss's 'Settings' page must update the global 'compensation_rate' which immediately reflects in the Driver's 'My Earnings' view.
universal_guidelines: Avoid generic 'AI slop' designs. Use specific shadcn overrides defined above.
Dark mode should not be pitch black (#000000) but Slate-950 (#020617).
Do not use gradients for backgrounds unless specifically for a 'Hero' card.
Use 'sonner' for all toasts. No default window.alert().
